query: SELECT p.id AS participant_id, p.displayName, p.avatarInitials, dl.id AS log_id, dl.dayNumber, dl.logDate, dl.exerciseDuration, dl.exerciseType, dl.exerciseProofUrl, dl.reflectionShared, CASE WHEN dl.reflectionShared = true THEN dl.reflectionText ELSE NULL END AS publicReflectionText, dl.readTeachText, dl.dayComplete, dl.pointsAwarded, dl.submittedAt FROM participants p LEFT JOIN daily_logs dl ON dl.participantId = p.id WHERE LOWER(p.displayName) LIKE '%ctm%' OR LOWER(p.avatarInitials) LIKE '%ctm%' ORDER BY dl.dayNumber DESC, dl.submittedAt DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2P9ir9M7b3E7Qkh.8b2c854ea8b3 --database HPubf4auNvt8KXvgrLad5c --execute SELECT p.id AS participant_id, p.displayName, p.avatarInitials, dl.id AS log_id, dl.dayNumber, dl.logDate, dl.exerciseDuration, dl.exerciseType, dl.exerciseProofUrl, dl.reflectionShared, CASE WHEN dl.reflectionShared = true THEN dl.reflectionText ELSE NULL END AS publicReflectionText, dl.readTeachText, dl.dayComplete, dl.pointsAwarded, dl.submittedAt FROM participants p LEFT JOIN daily_logs dl ON dl.participantId = p.id WHERE LOWER(p.displayName) LIKE '%ctm%' OR LOWER(p.avatarInitials) LIKE '%ctm%' ORDER BY dl.dayNumber DESC, dl.submittedAt DESC LIMIT 10;

rows.readTeachText: Chafe cream in Spanish is crema anti-rozaduras (necesito comprarlo mañana)

Bread spread quickly from Jordan across the world once wheat was cultivated in the Fertile Crescent and it played a significant role in the establishment of settled towns in preference to nomadic lifestyles.
